query: ContainerAppSystemLogs_CL | where ContainerAppName_s == 'ca-acrdnsfwdbyp-rdumlp' | where TimeGenerated between (todatetime('2026-06-29T00:46:57Z') .. todatetime('2026-06-29T00:52:42Z')) | where Reason_s in ('ImagePullFailed','ImagePullUnauthorized','BackOff','RevisionFailed','ReplicaFailed') | order by TimeGenerated asc | project TimeGenerated, RevisionName_s, ReplicaName_s, Reason_s, Log_s
